scripts.dev: bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles/index.css -o src/styles/output.css && (bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles/index.css -o src/styles/output.css --watch & bun --hot src/index.ts)
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:css && bun build ./src/index.html --outdir=dist --sourcemap --target=browser --minify --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --env='BUN_PUBLIC_*'
